UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWANSON, KAREN RIVERA, KARLA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
